description: House type is defined and exported from shared package
steps: Verify House interface exists in packages/shared/src/types.ts with fields: companyId, title, description, address, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, area, areaUnit, lotSize, houseType, status
Verify HouseInput, HouseStatus, HouseType, HouseFilters types are exported
Verify shared package builds without errors: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared

description: Reservation supports both flat and house property types
steps: Verify Reservation type has propertyType field of type PropertyType
Verify Reservation type has houseId field (string | null)
Verify Conversation type has propertyType and houseId fields

description: Contractor type includes contract value fields
steps: Verify Contractor type has contractValue field (number | null)
Verify Contractor type has currency field (string)
